scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:bun: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:bun -w @admin-demo/api" "bun --cwd apps/web run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @admin-demo/web && npm run build -w @admin-demo/api
scripts.build:panel: npm run build -w @admin-demo/web && npm run build -w @admin-demo/api
scripts.start:panel: npm run db:deploy -w @admin-demo/api && npm run start:bun -w @admin-demo/api
